channel.title: LLM Timeline — Zhipu AI (Tsinghua) Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Zhipu AI (Tsinghua).

item.title: GLM-4-0414 (Zhipu AI (Tsinghua))
item.description: Parameters: GLM-4-0414 License: open Type: model Family: GLM-4-32B-Base-0414, GLM-4-32B-0414, GLM-Z1-32B-0414 (reasoning), GLM-Z1-Rumination-32B-0414 (reasoning + deep research).

item.title: GLM-4 (Zhipu AI (Tsinghua))
item.description: Parameters: GLM-4 License: open Type: model Best Chinese model to date based on analysis. Follows OpenAI roadmap. MMLU=81.5. 'hundreds of billions of parameters' https://www.chatglm.cn/
